appmesh.route.httproutematch.CfnAbout: An object that represents the requirements for a route to match HTTP requests for a virtual router.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Headers.Description: The client request headers to match on.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Method.Description: The client request method to match on. Specify only one.
appmesh.route.httproutematch.Method.Allowed values: CONNECT | DELETE | GET | HEAD | OPTIONS | PATCH | POST | PUT | TRACE

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Path.Description: The client request path to match on.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Port.Description: The port number to match on.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Prefix.Description: Specifies the path to match requests with. This parameter must always start with `/`, which by itself matches all requests to the virtual service name. You can also match for path-based routing of requests. For example, if your virtual service name is `my-service.local` and you want the route to match requests to `my-service.local/metrics`, your prefix should be `/metrics`.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.QueryParame.Description: The client request query parameters to match on.

appmesh.route.httproutematch.Scheme.Description: The client request scheme to match on. Specify only one. Applicable only for HTTP2 routes.
